creator: gunther@5stengl.de
text:
port builds fine on the host:

# portmaster net-mgmt/net-snmp
[...]
===>>> Upgrade of net-snmp-5.7.1_7 to net-snmp-5.7.2 complete


but breaks in the ezjail with the error mentioned above. No
CFLAGS/CPUTYPE set in /etc/make.conf.
Neither in host-make.conf nor in ezjail-make.conf
